title: Maneye Mantralaya
subTitle: Pallavi plans to disclose Srikar's secret in the outhouse. Later, Srikar stealthily enters a room, evading the family's notice.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura seeks Shukracharya's blessings for war against Lord Shiva, but Shukracharya warns of dire consequences. Will Tarakasura heed the warning or proceed with his plans?

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Raani
subTitle: Sarala berates Sathya for earning less, and later they are startled upon learning from Gagana that Kaveri is still alive.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
subTitle: Sisters Bhagya and Lakshmi love each other unconditionally and share a close bond. Soon, Bhagya sets out in search of an ideal groom for Lakshmi who can keep her sister happy.

title: C.B.I. Shankar
subTitle: When Shankar, a CBI officer, and his team reopen the murder case of Santosh, their investigation into the events surrounding his death reveal interesting facts about the murderer.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Devappa enters the village and sets a house on fire using his evil powers. Balu's family, busy with the pooja preparations, notice the fire but Balu advises them to stay at home and not take any action. Will they listen to Balu's advice?

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Balu and his family begin the pooja. But fearing Devappa and Panch's orders, the villagers do not attend the pooja at Balu's house. Can Balu convince the villagers to attend the pooja?
